study_title: RNAseq and ATACseq on honey bee queenless workers (whole brain)
exp_title: RNA-seq of Apis mellifera: adult worker brain
design: RNAseq libraries were constructed and sequenced by the W.M. Keck Center for Comparative and Functional Genomics at the Roy J. Carver Biotechnology Center (University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign). Libraries were constructed from 500 ng RNA per sample using the TruSeq Stranded mRNA HT kit (Illumina) on an ePMotion 5075 robot (Eppendorf). Libraries were uniquely barcoded, quantified, and pooled for sequencing across 6 lanes with 100 nt single-end sequencing on the Illumina HiSeq 4000.
lab: Program in Ecology, Evolution and Conservation Bio
